phrases.intent_en: Ask where the underpass entrance is
phrases.text_local: Où est le passage souterrain pour entrer ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh leh pah-SAHZH soo-teh-RAIN poor on-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: Use the underground passage—never cross the traffic circle at street level.

responses.english: The underpass is on the other side of the avenue, on the right.
responses.phonetic: leh pah-SAHZH eh duh loh-TR koh-TAY duh lah-vay-NOO, sur lah drwaht
responses.french: Le passage est de l'autre côté de l'Avenue, sur la droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the terrace is open
phrases.cultural_note: Terrace access can pause in bad weather or high wind.

responses.english: Yes, it's open today. It depends on the wind too.
responses.phonetic: wee, el eh oo-VAIRT oh-ee. sah day-PAHN duh vahn oh-SEE
responses.french: Oui, elle est ouverte aujourd'hui. Ça dépend du vent aussi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how many steps to the top
phrases.text_local: Il y a combien de marches jusqu'en haut ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel yah kom-BYAN duh marsh zhusk-on OH
phrases.cultural_note: Expect around 200 steps for the viewpoint if elevator access is limited.

responses.english: There are about 200 steps without the elevator.
responses.phonetic: eel yah on-VYEHR deux-SAHNZ marsh sahn la-san-SUHR
responses.french: Il y a environ 200 marches sans ascenseur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the flame ceremony time
phrases.text_local: La cérémonie de la flamme est à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah say-ray-moh-NEE duh lah flam eh tah kel UR
phrases.cultural_note: The eternal flame ceremony is a key daily ritual; arrive early for a good view.

responses.english: The ceremony is at 6:30 PM every evening.
responses.phonetic: lah say-ray-moh-NEE eh tah sayz-oor sayk shah sohwahr
responses.french: La cérémonie est à 18h30 chaque soir.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which ticket line is faster
phrases.text_local: Quelle file va le plus vite ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel feel vah leh ploo veet
phrases.cultural_note: Online tickets usually reduce waiting, especially late afternoon.

responses.english: The line with online tickets is faster. Try that one.
responses.phonetic: lah feel ah-VEK bee-YAY on-LINE eh ploo rah-PEED. es-yay lah
responses.french: La file avec billet online est plus rapide. Essayez là.
